title: Back Office Operations & Systems Specialist with German

summary.lv: Circle K Biznesa centra Fuel Operations Control & Accounting nodaļa meklē Back Office Operations & Systems speciālistu ar vācu valodas prasmēm, kas darbosies ar operatīvajiem datiem un sistēmām Eiropas tirgū.
summary.en: Circle K Business Centre's Fuel Operations Control & Accounting department is hiring a German-speaking Back Office Operations & Systems Specialist to work with operational data and systems across the European market.
